nasb.text: “Blessed shall be the offspring of your body and the produce of your ground and the offspring of your beasts, the increase of your herd and the young of your flock.

esv.text: Blessed shall be the fruit of your womb and the fruit of your ground and the fruit of your cattle, the increase of your herds and the young of your flock.

cnv.text: 你身所生的、土地所出的、牲畜所出的、牛生殖的和羊所產的，都必蒙福。

ccb.text: “你们必子孙昌盛，五谷丰登，牛羊成群。
